/usr/bin/cc CMakeFiles/test_qdepextpotc.dir/test_qdepextpotc.c.o CMakeFiles/test_api_mm_utils.dir/testhelpers.f90.o CMakeFiles/test_api_mm_utils.dir/extchargepot.f90.o CMakeFiles/test_api_mm_utils.dir/extchargepotgen.f90.o -o test_qdepextpotc  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib ../../../../../../src/dftbp/libdftbplus.a ../../../../../../external/mpifx/origin/lib/libmpifx.a ../../../../../../external/scalapackfx/origin/lib/libscalapackfx.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi_usempif08.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi_usempi_ignore_tkr.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi_mpifh.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libopen-rte.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libopen-pal.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libhwloc.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libevent_core.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libevent_pthreads.so -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libscalapack-openmpi.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a -lm -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopenblas.so -lgfortran -lm -lquadmath -lm
